If CRH breaks structure without a retest, my stop loss at the recent consolidation low (94.85) or the 50-day SMA would have been hit. My stop is structural, not arbitrary. By waiting for the 50-day SMA retest, I am not betting on a pullback; I am betting on the probability that a true trend continuation will respect the 50-day mean. If it doesn't, the stop loss executes and I move on. This is the definition of process over prediction.

The VIX at 27.5 creates noise, but it does not negate the 65% edge of a trend following strategy when the ADX is above 20 and volume is confirming. My position sizing adjusts for volatility via ATR; if the stop widens due to VIX, the position size shrinks to maintain the 1.5% risk.
